system.notes: Reality-checking components (inertial nav, flux-density monitors) that negate enemy Electronic Deception (security/military only). Cost & weight by Level: L1 25,000¥/35 kg/SI 3, L2 80,000¥/45/SI 3.5, L3 200,000¥/60/SI 4, L4 750,000¥/60/SI 4.5, L5 2M¥/60/SI 5, L6 5M¥/110; Avail 8/30 days (L1) up to 16/1 year (L6); Base Time 10 hrs/level. Rigger 2 p.139.
